meta.title: The BANNED
lang.label: Language
intro.title: Who are we?
intro.text:
The BANNED: Four students by day transform in their free time, picking up their instruments to offer a fresh take on alternative rock. Their repertoire—made up of original compositions entirely created by the band members—draws on many musical flavours, including grunge, pop and funk. Each song reveals another side of their unique, vibrant world.
To share their passion for music fully, they will soon release their first two EPs on all platforms.
bio.anokhi: Since the age of 11, Anokhi has turned her passion into pure energy on stage. Between singing, dancing, piano, lyric writing and composing vocal melodies, she builds a unique, sincere and vibrant artistic world. Through her journey at BBM 74 and her many tours and concerts, she strives to make every performance a moment of connection with the audience. Creative, expressive and authentic, Anokhi makes her voice shine with heart and fervour.
bio.livio: Livio started classical guitar at 10 before switching to electric two years later, inspired by his parents' rock influences. Growing up to the sound of bands like AC/DC, Muse and the Red Hot Chili Peppers, his curiosity gradually led him to explore other styles—rap, jazz and classical music—and new instruments such as bass and piano. For Livio, music is a rich, endless universe through which he can express his emotions, share them with others and explore his creativity.
bio.tom: Music is a space where even the quietest people can express themselves and shine. Tom is living proof. Reserved in everyday life, he transforms completely the moment he picks up his guitar. On stage, he doesn't just play notes: he transmits an energy, an emotion and a passion that he offers to the audience. Every improvised solo tells the story of his hours of work, his perseverance and the love he puts into his music. Always ready to push himself further, Tom learned bass to support the band and enrich the collective project.
bio.vittorio: A musician since the age of 6, first on violin, Vittorio found his true calling at twelve when he sat behind a drum kit. A passion likely inherited from his father, himself a drummer in a rock band, but one Vittorio made his own by learning on his own—through listening, instinct and hours behind the kit. On stage, his goal is simple and sincere: to enjoy himself and pass that energy to the audience until the last note. Between power and precision, Vittorio is the engine that drives the band.
concerts.title: Concerts
concerts.intro: Whether the music moves you through resonant lyrics or catchy riffs, The BANNED give everything on stage—offering the audience a space to connect and, simply, to let go.
concerts.mov: Music Ô Vignes, Cressier, Château stage (4:45 pm)
